What happens is that i experience the new visual effects, but they seem to be a bit broken. perhaps it's my blacklisted card/driver?

### Post by etm124 on 2008-01-04

### Post by andrewsomething on 2008-01-04
It's possible to get around Compiz blacklisting your card, but not recommended. It was probably done so for a good reason. You could try the command given in this thread ([http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=582112](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=582112)), but do so at your own risk. I'd suggest trying to find out how it has gone for others with your card first.

If you only need a compositor inorder to run a dock like Kiba or AWN, there is another option worth looking into, xcompmgr. It's a much simpler compositor. It won't give you all the fancy effects, but it will allow you to run a dock.

---

### Post by ispy on 2008-01-04
To get a bottom dock back, You can just right click on the tp bar, select new bar and move that down. from there, simply right click on the new panel and hit "add to panel". add whatever you want from there.

hope that helped... :)

---
